source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A network consists of 16 vertices and 24 edges that connect them, as shown. An ant begins at the vertex labelled Start. Every minute, it walks from one vertex to a neighbouring vertex, crawling along a connecting edge. At which of the vertices labelled $P, Q, R, S, T$ can the ant be after 2019 minutes? <image1>

choice_map.E: all of the vertices are possible
